--- title: "Alpha Diversity" author: - name: Muluh params: index: default --- ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ## Group-wise comparisons - **Index:** observed - **Group variable:** diet - **Multiple testing correction:** FDR - **Statistical test** Wilcoxon In the report, a suffix of 1~ Baseline and 2~ Week 6 ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_observed_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-findings-before-after-1.png){#fig-figure-of-findings-before-after fig-align='center' width=480} ::: ::: ### Table of the top findings #### Across-group ##### Before treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-before .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ##### After treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-after .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell layout-align="center"} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_observed_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-findings-within-1.png){#fig-figure-of-findings-within fig-align='center' width=480} ::: ::: #### Within-group ##### Paired treatment - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** ::: {#tbl-table-of-findings-paired .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: ### LMM Research Question 1: Did the diet change the microbiota? - The interaction term (Treatment:Timepoint) tests whether the effect of time on Alpha diversity depends on the diet group. - Post-hoc analysis within each diet group identifies specific changes in Alpha diversity over time. Research Question 2: Was the microbiota equal between the diet groups before and after diet? - The main effect of diet tests for differences in Alpha diversity between diet groups at baseline. - Post-hoc analysis across diet groups at each timepoint identifies specific differences between diets Interpret the Results - Main Effects: - diet: Tests for differences in microbiota between Diet A and Diet B at Baseline. - duration: Tests for changes in microbiota over time across both diets. - diet:duration: Tests whether the effect of Timepoint depends on the diet group. - Random Effects: - (1|id): Accounts for within-subject variability. ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.cell} ::: - Multiple testing correction: **FDR** - Statistical test: **paired Wilcoxon** - Formula used: **~ diet * timepoint + (1 | id)** ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}

Week 6 |rice | -0.0264342| 0.0269273| 67| -0.9816886| 0.3297850| |Baseline - Week 6 |oat | 0.0419470| 0.0273204| 67| 1.5353756| 0.1294007| ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_observed_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-interaction-within-1.png){#fig-figure-of-interaction-within width=672} ::: ::: *Across-Group Comparisons* How to read the results; N.B This interpretation is an example of how to read. - For Marginal Means (emmeans): - Low diversity (e.g., Shannon = 2.5): "The mean Shannon diversity for diet oat was 2.5 (95% CI: 2.3, 2.7), indicating lower microbial diversity compared to typical healthy gut microbiomes (Shannon ~3-5)." - High diversity (e.g., Shannon = 4.2):"The mean Shannon diversity for diet rice was 4.2 (95% CI: 4.0, 4.4), indicating a rich and balanced microbial community." - For Contrasts: - Negative estimate (e.g., -0.8):"diet oat had significantly lower Shannon diversity than diet rice (estimate = -0.8, p < 0.05), suggesting reduced microbial richness." - Positive estimate (e.g., 0.8):"diet oat had significantly higher Shannon diversity than diet rice (estimate = 0.8, p < 0.05), suggesting enhanced microbial balance." ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction-across-emmeans .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} Table: Estimated Marginal Means for Diets |diet |duration | coef| 2 ^ coef| SE| df| lower.CL| lower.CL_actual| upper.CL| upper.CL_actual| |:----|:--------|--------:|--------:|---------:|--------:|--------:|---------------:|--------:|---------------:| |rice |Baseline | 8.145789| 283.2218| 0.0791392| 70.99039| 7.987989| 253.8776| 8.303588| 315.9578| |oat |Baseline | 8.017592| 259.1408| 0.0802946| 70.99039| 7.857489| 231.9209| 8.177695| 289.5554| |rice |Week 6 | 8.172223| 288.4591| 0.0791392| 70.99039| 8.014423| 258.5722| 8.330022| 321.8004| |oat |Week 6 | 7.975645| 251.7146| 0.0802946| 70.99039| 7.815542| 225.2748| 8.135748| 281.2576| ::: ::: ::: {#tbl-table-of-interaction-across-contrasts .cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} Table: Estimated contrasts for Diets |contrast |duration | estimate| SE| df| t.ratio| p.value| |:----------|:--------|---------:|---------:|--------:|--------:|---------:| |rice - oat |Baseline | 0.1281965| 0.1127397| 70.99039| 1.137102| 0.2593193| |rice - oat |Week 6 | 0.1965777| 0.1127397| 70.99039| 1.743643| 0.0855504| ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](alpha_observed_files/figure-html/fig-figure-of-interaction-across-1.png){#fig-figure-of-interaction-across width=672} ::: ::: ## Data Summary ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` class: TreeSummarizedExperiment dim: 1700 138 metadata(0): assays(1): relabundance rownames(1700): SGB4933 SGB4285 ...
